problem id: e05e9ed2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  01010011 -> 00000100
  11001101 -> 00010011
  10001101 -> 00010010
  11100011 -> 10000111
  10010000 -> 00000000
  11100000 -> 10000001
  11101101 -> 10010011
  00011111 -> 00111100
  11011110 -> 00111001

query: 11000011
predicted answer: 00000111
